scope: detail-page runtime static scan for frontend field consumption beyond the main bundle

negative_findings.note: Not observed in SSR payloads, main/legacy bundles, lazy chunks, or scanned player/runtime scripts.
Observed hits were only polyfill/alphabet noise, not detail business-field reads.

current_judgment: Current evidence says the detail-page main chain and its known secondary runtime do not directly consume `upload_src` or `F` as named business fields.
remaining_gap: A browser-level dynamic property-read hook would still be the strongest final negative check.
